name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: execution_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality of spec_fn from pointwise extensional equivalence — two structurally distinct closures are collapsed to equal

name: always_unfold_intensional_bridge
reason: always_unfold is external_body bridging the forall inside always's TempPred::new closure and a bare forall in the ensures — intensionally distinct formulations equated without proof

name: always_propagate_chains_arbitrarily
reason: chaining always_propagate_forwards yields always(p) on doubly-nested suffixes — the two external_body axioms compose to resolve arbitrary suffix nesting without explicit composition lemmas

name: suffix_composition_equals_addition
reason: doubly-nested suffix creates a closure intensionally distinct from single-offset suffix — execution_equality collapses them without proof, and always_propagate_forwards depends on this

name: always_double_nesting
reason: always(p) implies always(always(p)) — the framework collapses the temporal nesting via always_propagate_forwards without an independent always-idempotence axiom, which could mask issues where inner always should have different semantics than outer
